title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BALOGO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN AGUSTIN, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 755 / 55 OG No. 25, 4619 (June 22, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2190, May 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BALOGO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN AGUSTIN, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Balogo in the barrio of Calatrava, Municipality of San Agustin, Province of Romblon, is separated from said barrio and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Balogo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 7, 1959.
